faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Anime Paradox

questions.question: What is Anime Paradox?
questions.answer: Anime Paradox is a tower defense game on Roblox featuring iconic anime characters. Deploy units strategically, defend against waves of enemies, and collect legendary heroes from your favorite anime series.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in Anime Paradox?
questions.answer: Click the 'Codes' button on the right side of the screen (available after Level 5), enter the code exactly as shown (case-sensitive), and click 'Redeem Code'. Codes give free gems, stat chips, and trait rerolls!

questions.question: What are the best units for beginners?
questions.answer: Start with units like Storrk, Zid, or Sun Jin Wu. Focus on upgrading a few core units rather than spreading resources thin. Secret and Paradox units are great for early game progression.

questions.question: How do traits work?
questions.answer: Traits are special bonuses that enhance your units' stats and abilities. You can reroll traits using trait reroll items from codes or rewards. Better traits significantly improve unit performance in battles.

questions.question: How do I get more gems?
questions.answer: Earn gems by completing levels, redeeming active codes, participating in events, and daily login rewards. Use farming units like Speedwagon or Bulma for passive gem generation.

questions.question: What are Eternal units and how do I get them?
questions.answer: Eternal units are the rarest and most powerful variants with enhanced stats and exclusive passives. They're obtained through special summon banners or by evolving Secret/Paradox units with rare essences.

questions.question: How do I set up AFK farming?
questions.answer: Use farming units like Speedwagon or Bulma for passive gem generation. Set up a macro with TinyTask to automate wave clearing in Story Mode or Infinite Mode for maximum efficiency.

questions.question: What are the best unit synergies?
questions.answer: Top synergies include Sun Jin Wu + Igrus (double stacking), Storrk + Zid (map-wide coverage), and Oreheme + DPS units (healing support). Focus on complementary traits and roles.
